summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Business Management System. Backend APIs working well (90.3% success rate), but critical frontend integration issue found due to mixed content errors.

minor_issues.issue: Require trailing slash to avoid 307 redirects
minor_issues.impact: Minor - redirects work but not optimal

critical_bugs.issue: Mixed Content Error - Frontend making HTTP requests from HTTPS page
critical_bugs.details: Frontend served over HTTPS but making HTTP API calls, causing browser to block requests

integration_issues.issue: API calls blocked by browser due to mixed content policy
integration_issues.symptoms: Pages show 'Loading...' or empty states, console shows mixed content errors

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mixed content error - Frontend is making HTTP requests from HTTPS page. All API calls are being blocked by browser security policy. Need to ensure frontend uses HTTPS for all API calls.
